evals.description: Fixed synthetic diff with multiple security issues — no network required, fully reproducible
Docs-majority diff must trigger docs-quality special rule regardless of diff size
evals.prompt:
Review this diff:

diff --git a/README.md b/README.md
index abc..def 100644
--- a/README.md
+++ b/README.md
@@ -1,3 +1,5 @@
 # My Project
 
-Install with npm.
+## Installation
+
+Install with `npm install my-project`. Run `npm start` to launch.
diff --git a/docs/guide.md b/docs/guide.md
new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/docs/guide.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Guide
+
+See README for setup.
+
+Configuration options are listed below.

evals.description: Vague opinion request with no diff or code reference must NOT trigger the skill pipeline
evals.prompt: What do you think of these changes?

evals.description: Second run on same PR slug must mark findings that match existing logbook entries as duplicate-logbook rather than inserting fresh rows
evals.prompt: Review PR #42 [precondition: logbook ~/logbooks/code-review/pr-42.sqlite already contains a finding for src/auth.ts line 22 with status=new]

evals.description: A diff under 100 lines must produce at most 3 heuristic angles (plus always-on and applicable special-rule angles)
evals.prompt:
Review this diff:

diff --git a/config.yaml b/config.yaml
--- a/config.yaml
+++ b/config.yaml
@@ -1,3 +1,5 @@
 database:
   host: localhost
+  password: secret123
+  token: abc
   port: 5432
